completed_stories.title: Wire Macro Regime into Conviction Score
Expand Ticker Universe with Sector ETFs
Open Trade Age Indicator and Quick-Close UI
Analyst Agent — Weight Optimisation (Sprint 6 run)
completed_stories.notes: 8/8 tests. No weight change — news constant at 50. Re-run as S22 with real scores.

completed_stories.title: Analyst Weight Re-Optimisation (with real news scores)
completed_stories.notes: Re-run 2026-04-04. Still no improvement — backfilled trades have news_score=NULL, imputed to 50.0. Zero variance in news pillar. metrics/weight_optimisation_20260404.json written. Re-run trigger: >=30 new trades with real AV news_score accumulated.

completed_stories.title: BUY/SELL/HOLD Signals in Leaderboard API + UI
completed_stories.notes: annotate_signals() wired into leaderboard API and scoring universe endpoint. signal field added to LeaderboardEntry, ScoreResponse (API + TypeScript). Signal badge rendered in Leaderboard.tsx. 8/8 unit tests passing. Bugfix in Sprint 9: signals were not appearing because UI calls /api/scores/universe not /api/leaderboard.

completed_stories.title: Add Sector Field to Ticker Model
completed_stories.notes: sector column added. Migration 005 applied. 76 tickers seeded. 5/5 tests. AMBER health resolved to GREEN.

completed_stories.title: Pre-Flight Variance Check in Weight Optimiser
completed_stories.notes: check_pillar_variance() added. Exit code 2 on abort. 8/8 tests passing.

completed_stories.title: Fix FastAPI regex= Deprecation Warnings
completed_stories.notes: 9 occurrences of regex= replaced with pattern= in scoring.py and accuracy.py.

completed_stories.title: Regime-Adaptive Signal Thresholds
completed_stories.notes: _REGIME_THRESHOLDS dict replaces 4 module-level constants. generate_signal() and annotate_signals() accept regime param. BEAR: BUY at 65+ (was 75), SELL at 50+ (was 60). MacroRegimeService wired into both /api/leaderboard and /api/scores/universe. signal field added to ScoreResponse. 20/20 signal tests passing (9 new regime tests).

completed_stories.title: Regime Stratified Analysis Script
completed_stories.notes: scripts/regime_stratified_analysis.py written and run. All 2,714 trades labelled UNKNOWN — macro_indicators has no T10Y2Y data. H12 appended to HYPOTHESES.md: T10Y2Y data gap blocks regime stratification. Action: seed macro_indicators with T10Y2Y historical series (Sprint 11 S31).

completed_stories.title: Signal Health Endpoint
completed_stories.notes: GET /api/health/signals live (200). Returns news_cache_count, news_cache_age_hours, av_key_configured, real_news_scored_trades, weight_rerun_ready. 7/7 tests in tests/api/test_signal_health.py. AV warning banner added to Leaderboard UI (amber, conditional on av_key_configured==false). SignalHealthResponse + healthAPI added to frontend client.ts.

sprint_notes: Sprint 10 complete. S28: regime-adaptive signal thresholds (BULL/CAUTION/BEAR). S29: regime stratified analysis — T10Y2Y data missing, all trades UNKNOWN, H12 written. S30: /api/health/signals endpoint live + AV warning banner in UI. 154/154 tests, 5/5 smoke check. Next: S31 (seed T10Y2Y), S32 (FRED news fallback), S33 (conviction threshold tuning H3).
